text.content: Comprehensive analysis and comparison of 3 French health insurance offers (5 total plans) for Yannick's wife who relocated from Switzerland. Created exhaustive comparison covering rehabilitation, transport, home care, medical equipment and dental coverage. Developed interactive website and detailed PDF report with unified nomenclature. Identified PS1330 pricing issues and provided extrapolated rates for 78-year-old woman in Divonne-les-Bains.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Comprehensive analysis and comparison of 3 French health insurance offers (5 total plans) for Yannick's wife who relocated from Switzerland. Created exhaustive comparison covering rehabilitation, transport, home care, medical equipment and dental coverage. Developed interactive website and detailed PDF report with unified nomenclature. Identified PS1330 pricing issues and provided extrapolated rates for 78-year-old woman in Divonne-les-Bains.


## Context & Intent

User needed to choose optimal French health insurance plan after relocating from Switzerland, requiring detailed comparison of coverage for specific needs including rehabilitation, transport, home care services, medical equipment, and various healthcare services


## What Was Done

Analyzed 3 insurance documents (5 plans total), unified different nomenclatures for comparison, researched missing information online, created interactive comparison website, generated comprehensive PDF report, extrapolated missing PS1330 pricing based on age/location


## Outputs Produced

- [website] Interactive comparison site — Deployed web application with detailed insurance comparison tables and PDF download
- [pdf] Comprehensive insurance report — 20+ page detailed analysis with unified comparison tables and recommendations
- [pricing_analysis] Tariff extrapolation — Estimated PS1330 pricing for 78-year-old woman in Divonne-les-Bains

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Recommended Harmonie Mutuelle PS1330 as optimal choice based on cost-benefit analysis
- Used web research to fill missing information gaps
- Extrapolated pricing using demographic and geographic factors
- Created unified nomenclature system for fair comparison

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Comprehensive document analysis approach
- Web research for missing details
- Interactive website format for complex comparisons
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial oversight of missing PS1330 pricing
- Nomenclature discrepancies between documents and official websites
Discoveries:

- French healthcare sector terminology (secteur 1/2 specialists)
- Insurance naming inconsistencies (PS vs PSI codes)
- Age-based pricing extrapolation methodology

## Challenges & Blockers

- Missing PS1330 pricing in original documents
- Inconsistent nomenclature between insurers
- Complex French healthcare terminology for Swiss resident

## Open Questions

- Need to confirm PS1330 = PSI330 correspondence with Harmonie Mutuelle
- Verify extrapolated pricing accuracy
- Validate all coverage details with insurers

## Next Steps

- Contact Harmonie Mutuelle for official PS1330/PSI330 quote
- Confirm extrapolated pricing
- Make final insurance selection based on confirmed pricing
---
